videos.headline: Georgia Tech's Haynes King scores on QB keeper
videos.description: Haynes King takes a QB draw for a 20-yard touchdown to give Georgia Tech a 17-7 lead.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Georgia Tech’s Haynes King scores on QB keeper) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Haynes King scores 2nd rushing touchdown against UNC
videos.description: Haynes King gets to the edge to score his second touchdown against UNC.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Haynes King scores 2nd rushing touchdown against UNC) 2024/10/12 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alijah Huzzie takes off for 69-yard punt return TD
videos.description: Alijah Huzzie takes a punt return back 69 yards for a North Carolina touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alijah Huzzie takes off for 69-yard punt return TD) 2024/10/12 ESHEET
